ddls:
CREATE TABLE "airlines" (
  "airline_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each airline */,
  "airline_name" TEXT /* Name of the airline */,
  "airline_code" TEXT /* Code of the airline (e.g., AI for Air India) */,
  "airline_description" TEXT /* Brief description of the airline */,
  "airline_website" TEXT /* Website URL of the airline */,
  "airline_rating" REAL /* Overall rating of the airline */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("airline_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "airline_contacts" (
  "contact_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each contact */,
  "airline_id" INTEGER /* ID of the airline */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the airline */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the airline */,
  "physical_address" TEXT /* Physical address of the airline */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("contact_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "airports" (
  "airport_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each airport */,
  "airport_name" TEXT /* Name of the airport */,
  "airport_code" TEXT /* Code of the airport (e.g., DEL for Delhi) */,
  "city" TEXT /* City where the airport is located */,
  "airport_description" TEXT /* Brief description of the airport */,
  "airport_rating" REAL /* Overall rating of the airport */,
  "latitude" REAL /* Latitude of the airport */,
  "longitude" REAL /* Longitude of the airport */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("airport_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "airport_facilities" (
  "facility_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each facility */,
  "airport_id" INTEGER /* ID of the airport */,
  "facility_type" TEXT /* Type of facility (e.g., food and beverage, shopping, lounges) */,
  "facility_description" TEXT /* Description of the facility */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("facility_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "flights" (
  "flight_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each flight */,
  "airline_id" INTEGER /* ID of the airline operating the flight */,
  "departure_airport_id" INTEGER /* ID of the departure airport */,
  "arrival_airport_id" INTEGER /* ID of the arrival airport */,
  "departure_time" TEXT /* Departure time of the flight */,
  "arrival_time" TEXT /* Arrival time of the flight */,
  "time_taken" REAL /* Time taken by the flight */,
  "stops" INTEGER /* Number of stops in the flight */,
  "flight_type" TEXT /* Type of flight (e.g., domestic, international) */,
  "flight_description" TEXT /* Brief description of the flight */,
  "flight_status" TEXT /* Current status of the flight (e.g., scheduled, departed, arrived, canceled) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("flight_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_flights_arrival_airport_id FOREIGN KEY ("arrival_airport_id") REFERENCES airports ("airport_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_flights_airline_id FOREIGN KEY ("airline_id") REFERENCES airlines ("airline_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_flights_departure_airport_id FOREIGN KEY ("departure_airport_id") REFERENCES airports ("airport_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "flight_legs" (
  "leg_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each leg */,
  "flight_id" INTEGER /* ID of the flight */,
  "departure_airport_id" INTEGER /* ID of the departure airport */,
  "arrival_airport_id" INTEGER /* ID of the arrival airport */,
  "departure_time" TEXT /* Departure time of the leg */,
  "arrival_time" TEXT /* Arrival time of the leg */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("leg_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "flight_schedules" (
  "schedule_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each schedule */,
  "flight_id" INTEGER /* ID of the flight */,
  "departure_date" TEXT /* Departure date of the flight */,
  "return_date" TEXT /* Return date of the flight */,
  "days_left" INTEGER /* Number of days left before the flight */,
  "schedule_status" TEXT /* Status of the schedule (e.g., confirmed, pending, canceled) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("schedule_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_flight_schedules_flight_id FOREIGN KEY ("flight_id") REFERENCES flights ("flight_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "flight_prices" (
  "price_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each price */,
  "flight_id" INTEGER /* ID of the flight */,
  "class" TEXT /* Class of the flight (e.g., Economy, Business) */,
  "price" INTEGER /* Price of the flight */,
  "price_class" TEXT /* Class of the price (e.g., economy, business) */,
  "currency" TEXT /* Currency of the price */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("price_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_flight_prices_flight_id FOREIGN KEY ("flight_id") REFERENCES flights ("flight_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "flight_bookings" (
  "booking_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each booking */,
  "flight_id" INTEGER /* ID of the flight */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who booked the flight */,
  "booking_date" TEXT /* Date when the flight was booked */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the booking (e.g., booked, canceled) */,
  "booking_status" TEXT /* Status of the booking (e.g., confirmed, pending, canceled) */,
  "booking_refund_status" TEXT /* Refund status of the booking (e.g., refunded, not refunded) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("booking_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_flight_bookings_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_flight_bookings_flight_id FOREIGN KEY ("flight_id") REFERENCES flights ("flight_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "password" TEXT /* Password of the user */,
  "user_type" TEXT /* Type of user (e.g., individual, corporate) */,
  "user_contact_info" TEXT /* Contact information of the user (e.g., phone number, email address) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_payment_methods" (
  "payment_method_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each payment method */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user */,
  "payment_method" TEXT /* Method of payment (e.g., credit card, net banking) */,
  "payment_method_details" TEXT /* Details of the payment method (e.g., credit card number, net banking credentials) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("payment_method_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "payments" (
  "payment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each payment */,
  "booking_id" INTEGER /* ID of the booking */,
  "payment_method" TEXT /* Method of payment (e.g., credit card, net banking) */,
  "payment_date" TEXT /* Date when the payment was made */,
  "amount" INTEGER /* Amount paid */,
  "payment_mode" TEXT /* Mode of payment (e.g., credit card, net banking) */,
  "payment_refund_status" TEXT /* Refund status of the payment (e.g., refunded, not refunded) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("payment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_payments_booking_id FOREIGN KEY ("booking_id") REFERENCES flight_bookings ("booking_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "flight_reviews" (
  "review_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each review */,
  "flight_id" INTEGER /* ID of the flight */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who gave the review */,
  "review_date" TEXT /* Date when the review was given */,
  "rating" INTEGER /* Rating given by the user (e.g., 1-5) */,
  "review" TEXT /* Review given by the user */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("review_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_flight_reviews_flight_id FOREIGN KEY ("flight_id") REFERENCES flights ("flight_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_flight_reviews_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "flight_ratings" (
  "rating_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each rating */,
  "flight_id" INTEGER /* ID of the flight */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who gave the rating */,
  "rating_date" TEXT /* Date when the rating was given */,
  "rating" INTEGER /* Rating given by the user (e.g., 1-5) */,
  "rating_type_id" INTEGER /* ID of the rating type (e.g., cleanliness, punctuality, overall experience) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("rating_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_flight_ratings_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_flight_ratings_rating_type_id FOREIGN KEY ("rating_type_id") REFERENCES rating_types ("rating_type_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_flight_ratings_flight_id FOREIGN KEY ("flight_id") REFERENCES flights ("flight_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "rating_types" (
  "rating_type_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each rating type */,
  "rating_type" TEXT /* Type of rating (e.g., cleanliness, punctuality, overall experience) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("rating_type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "flight_comments" (
  "comment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each comment */,
  "flight_id" INTEGER /* ID of the flight */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who gave the comment */,
  "comment_date" TEXT /* Date when the comment was given */,
  "comment" TEXT /* Comment given by the user */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("comment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_flight_comments_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_flight_comments_flight_id FOREIGN KEY ("flight_id") REFERENCES flights ("flight_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "flight_code" (
  "code_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each code */,
  "flight_id" INTEGER /* ID of the flight */,
  "code" TEXT /* Code of the flight (e.g., 613-UK) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("code_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "flight_blacklist" (
  "blacklist_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each blacklist entry */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user */,
  "blacklist_reason" TEXT /* Reason for blacklisting the user */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("blacklist_id")
)
